MACHINERY INFORMATION BOOK 
 
July/14/2026 
 
As is of public knowledge, the amount of time and resources lost due to lack of information in 
companies across the globe reaches astronomical figures. Communication is the key to success 
in many companies, and accurate information is fundamental to the timely development of 
projects. This brochure is still in progress; it's been two years of work, gathering information, 
comparing and correcting errors in the information, to provide a book with information at hand 
to solve accidental breakdowns that occur in production equipment, often due to breakage of 
basic components subject to constant stress, variable loads, and also abuse of the same, such 
as belts, hoses, alternators, starters, batteries. When this occurs, this book provides 
information at hand on these components to avoid prolonged downtime of machinery in 
service. 
 
Darwin H.
